title: Daemon Local QA Candidate Decision

decisions.reason: Manual QA browser-local state still needs exported redacted evidence before it can close.
Declared browser interactions need a system-owned verifier instead of Codex or human inference.
Runtime detail visual intent needs a captured golden evidence artifact.
No-token CI proves the repair path; live staging bootstrap evidence belongs to the private fixture loop.
No-token CI proves device repair classification until staging fixture evidence is supplied.
Profile thumbnail live intent evidence remains outside daemon runtime ownership.
Assignable-agent live probe needs redacted staging fixture evidence.
Multi-assignment live probe needs redacted staging fixture evidence.
Thread subscription live probe needs redacted staging fixture evidence.
SSE replay live probe needs redacted staging fixture evidence.
Thread message live probe needs redacted staging fixture evidence.
Domain account fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain workspace fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain team fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain project fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain milestone fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain task fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain agent fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Domain thread fixture evidence is private and must be supplied through the staging fixture handoff.
Staging fixture handoff must produce redacted account/workspace/team/task/agent/thread evidence.
Figma refresh gate needs fresh redacted golden/source evidence before the candidate can close.

Desktop app-quit can stop the AI Agent daemon on a local Mac; when local stop evidence observes that state, the product needs an explicit lifecycle claim and verifier for whether SaaS runtimes should survive app teardown.

assertions: every local QA closed-loop candidate must have exactly one decision record
decision records without a matching candidate are stale loop residue and must fail verification unless candidate_scope is local_observed
decision records must name owner, priority, disposition, next loop, next artifact, and reason
triage-required and deferred decisions must name review_by
decision next_artifact must be one of the candidate required_next_artifacts

loop.observation: Local QA run evidence can expose closed-loop candidates while prioritization still lives in human memory.
loop.hypothesis: A daemon-owned candidate decision sidecar can force every current candidate to bind owner, priority, disposition, next loop, and next artifact.
loop.execute: Verify the generated decision reader, then consume out/local-qa-run.json from the same local-qa-runner workflow and publish decision evidence.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails on missing candidate input, missing candidate decisions, orphan decisions, incomplete decision metadata, or next_artifact values outside the candidate's required_next_artifacts.
loop.retrospective: Harnesses still explore broadly, but their findings cannot remain passive reports after local QA produces a candidate list.
